name: code-app
description: Cross-platform desktop wrapper for Codex SDK

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @code-app/shared && npm run build --workspace @code-app/renderer && npm run build --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @code-app/main && npm run test --workspace @code-app/renderer
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run package:mac --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npm run package:linux --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.package:all: npm run build && npm run package:all --workspace @code-app/main
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @code-app/main && npm run lint --workspace @code-app/renderer
